SUB: Transcript of Earning call with analyst/investor meet held on 6th August 2024. 
Madam/Sir, 
In continuation of our earlier letter dated 1 st August, 2024 and 6th August, 2024 and pursuant to 
Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015, please find attached herewith transcript of Earning call with 
Investors/ Analyst of PFC held on 6th August 2024. This is submitted for your information, record 
and futiher dissemination. 
Transcript of the above-mentioned conference call has been made available on 12.08.2024 
is attached herewith and can also be accessed at https://pfcindia.corn/ensite/Home/VS/109.   
Thanking you, 
Yours faithfully, 
For Power Finance Corporation Ltd.
